mapper.sql: select l.location_id, l.parent_id, l.ancestors, l.location_code, l.location_name, l.location_type, l.dept_id, l.manager_user_id, l.order_num, l.status, l.del_flag, l.create_by, l.create_time, l.update_by, l.update_time, l.remark, p.location_name as parent_name from asset_location l left join asset_location p on p.location_id = l.parent_id
mapper.select: where find_in_set(#{locationId}, l.ancestors) and l.del_flag = '0' order by l.parent_id, l.order_num, l.location_id
select count(1) from asset_location where parent_id = #{locationId} and del_flag = '0'
select count(1) from asset_info where current_location_id = #{locationId} and del_flag = '0'
where l.location_name = #{locationName} and l.parent_id = #{parentId} and l.del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.update:
update asset_location set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where location_id in
#{locationId}
